g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the root node contain in a B-Tree index?')
sendPrompt('How does B-Tree branch node work?')
sendPrompt('What is in leaf nodes of a B-Tree?')

svg.text: Leaf nodes (linked list ↔ for range scans)
Heap (actual table rows — unordered, stored in 8KB pages)
Lookup id=30: Root → Internal(30|40) → Leaf(28,30,35) → Heap. Always O(log N).
